summary: Project has a bug where form reset on page load is also clearing saved records from the database. Only form fields should reset, not stored data.
known_issues: Form reset on page load is incorrectly clearing saved records from the database; only form fields should be reset, not stored data.

existing_features.title: Fix the form reset logic across all form modals (PurchaseOrderFormModal, SupplierFormModal, StaffFormModal, ShiftFormModal, Expenses) so that resetting form fields on page load or modal mount only clears the local React form state (input fields return to blank defaults) and does NOT delete, overwrite, or otherwise affect any saved records stored in the Zustand app store or backend database.
